after anthro-dragon aliens named 'Darkonites' invaded earth, you think you are miraculously the last human alive. However, as you thought you were left to rot under a pile of rubble, you were earthed by a familiar face; Tasha, your childhood crush, now queen and hyperpreggers broodmother of darkonites.
